features.title: Features
features.heading: Light, shadow, and sound—believable presence without surveillance.
features.lede: Kevin® simulates human activity the way burglars actually look for it: warm light through curtains, moving shadows, and everyday household sounds. No cameras. No microphones. Everything plays from local storage on the device.
features.image_alt: Kevin® device — front view, studio product photo

blocks.heading: Three layers of believable presence.
blocks.body: Kevin® simulates people at home using AI-driven light, shadow, and sound—visible and audible from outside, exactly where burglars look first.

blocks.image_alt: Kevin® light scenarios projected through a window
blocks.title: Light scenarios
blocks.body: Warm, changing scenes make rooms look actively used—not simply lit. Kevin adapts rhythm for day and night deterrence.

blocks.image_alt: Kevin® moving shadow simulation visible through curtains
blocks.title: Moving shadows
blocks.body: Projected silhouettes suggest one or more people inside. Visible through curtains—exactly where burglars look first.

blocks.title: Everyday sounds
blocks.body: 70+ hours of built-in simulations plus your own uploads. AI-generated household sounds adapt to feel personal and less repetitive.

blocks.heading: Deterrence before break-in.
blocks.body: Alarms react after entry. Cameras record evidence and can fail when Wi-Fi is jammed. Kevin focuses on believable occupancy from outside—before anyone tests the door.

blocks.image_alt: Wi-Fi jamming disables cameras — Kevin keeps simulating locally
blocks.title: Jammer-resilient by design
blocks.body: Even when burglars use jamming devices to disable Wi-Fi cameras and alarm systems, Kevin keeps projecting believable presence. Simulations are stored locally on the device—not streamed from the cloud.

blocks.image_alt: Kevin® complements an existing alarm system
blocks.title: Complements alarms and cameras
blocks.body: Alarms detect intrusions—Kevin helps prevent them. It adds realistic presence simulation so burglars think twice before approaching. An extra layer that works alongside what you already have.

blocks.heading: Privacy-first. Plug and play.
blocks.body: Engineered and designed in Switzerland. Typical use around 9 watts. No installation, no wiring, no monitoring panel.

blocks.title: At home, Kevin is more than security
blocks.body: When you are not away, Kevin doubles as a Bluetooth speaker and lamp—so the device earns its place in your living room every day.

features.cta_subheading: Choose your color and buy outright with free delivery across Europe and a 3-year Swiss warranty.

how-it-works.title: How it works
how-it-works.heading: Kevin® simulates people at home—so you can leave calmly.
how-it-works.lede: Swiss-engineered presence simulation: light scenarios, moving shadows, and everyday sounds. Plug in near a visible window, set schedules or geo-fencing in the app, and let believable occupancy run from local storage.
how-it-works.image_alt: Kevin® device — side profile product photo

blocks.heading: Plug in. Schedule. Leave with peace of mind.
blocks.body: Setup takes about 60 seconds. No installation, no wiring, no monitoring panel.

blocks.title: Plug & play
blocks.body: Place Kevin near a visible window with a wall or ceiling for shadows. Connect the included power cable (approx. 3 m)—typical use around 9 watts.

blocks.title: Schedule or geo-fence
blocks.body: Tell Kevin when to simulate presence—or let geo-fencing activate automatically the moment you leave, even for a short walk or coffee run.

blocks.title: Stay believable
blocks.body: Light, shadow, and sound play from local storage—not streamed from the cloud. Jammer-resilient protection when Wi-Fi security fails.

blocks.heading: Built for how you actually leave home.
blocks.body: Whether you commute, travel, or manage multiple properties—Kevin adapts to your routine.

blocks.image_alt: Activate Kevin via the app on your way to work
blocks.title: Heading to work
blocks.body: Activate Kevin via the app on your way out. While you focus on your day, Kevin makes it look like you are still at home.

blocks.image_alt: Schedule Kevin for holidays and weekend trips
blocks.title: Weekends and holidays
blocks.body: Schedule simulations in advance for getaways. Your home looks lived-in and cared for—even from thousands of miles away.

blocks.image_alt: Manage multiple Kevin devices in one app
blocks.title: Multiple properties
blocks.body: Own several homes, a vacation rental, or business sites? Add a Kevin to each location and manage them all in one app.

blocks.heading: Prevention beats reaction.
blocks.body: Mitipi research cites up to 97% reduction in burglary probability when prevention is used. 70% of burglaries happen during daytime. Burglars need as little as five minutes.

blocks.title: Works in homes, offices, and shops
blocks.body: Kevin simulates presence in apartments, houses, offices, shops, and warehouses. Place near a window or visible area, configure in the Kevin app, and let believable occupancy run from local storage.

how-it-works.cta_subheading: Pick your color and continue to secure Shopify checkout.

the-kevin-app.title: The Kevin App
the-kevin-app.heading: Protection that runs while you live your life.
the-kevin-app.lede: Activate instantly, schedule in advance, or let geo-fencing turn Kevin on when you leave. Manage multiple devices and properties from one app.
the-kevin-app.image_alt: Kevin® device close-up — fabric panel and controls

blocks.heading: Set it and forget it—or take full control.
blocks.body: The Kevin app puts scheduling, geo-fencing, and personalization in your pocket. No monitoring panel. No third-party access to your home.

blocks.title: Set it and forget it
blocks.body: Schedule simulations for weekends, holidays, or daily routines—protection that fits around your lifestyle.

blocks.title: Geo-fencing
blocks.body: Kevin knows when you leave and starts protecting your space—no taps, no texts, just smart automation.

blocks.image_alt: Manage multiple Kevin devices in the app
blocks.title: Multiple properties
blocks.body: Own several homes, a vacation rental, or business sites? Add a Kevin to each location and manage them all in one app.

blocks.image_alt: Kevin® device with personalized sound settings
blocks.title: Make it personal
blocks.body: Record or upload familiar home sounds. Kevin uses them—and AI-generated household audio—to create a more believable presence that adapts over time to your routine.

blocks.title: Smarter sounds with AI
blocks.body: Kevin can generate natural household sounds intelligently, adapting over time to your routine and home environment—without cameras or microphones.

blocks.heading: Pair the app after unboxing.
blocks.body: Download the Kevin app, connect over Wi-Fi or Bluetooth, and confirm firmware is up to date.

blocks.title: Download the Kevin app
blocks.body: Available for iOS and Android. Search for Kevin by Mitipi in your app store after purchase.

blocks.title: Pair your device
blocks.body: Follow the in-app guide to connect Kevin over Wi-Fi or Bluetooth. Rename your device if you like.

blocks.title: Choose your routine
blocks.body: Activate instantly, schedule by day and hour, or enable geo-fencing so Kevin starts when you leave.

the-kevin-app.cta_heading: Pair the app with your Kevin.
the-kevin-app.cta_subheading: Download the Kevin app after purchase to schedule, geo-fence, and personalize simulations.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.heading: One-time purchase. Lifetime updates included.
pricing.lede: Buy Kevin® outright with free lifetime membership, software updates, 3-year Swiss warranty, and free delivery across Europe.
pricing.image_alt: Kevin® device — top view product photo

blocks.heading: Everything you need to deter burglaries.
blocks.body: One transparent price. No hidden monitoring fees. Device ownership with software updates for life.

blocks.title: Your Kevin purchase includes
blocks.body: Kevin® device with your chosen front cover color · Kevin App control · 70+ hours of built-in simulations · Weekly schedules and geo-fencing · Upload your own household sounds · AI-generated household audio · Bluetooth speaker and lamp at home · Flexible placement with approx. 3 m power cable · Free delivery across Europe · 3-year Swiss warranty · Lifetime software updates · 30-day returns

blocks.heading: Pricing FAQ
blocks.body: Common questions about buying Kevin on mitipi.eu.

blocks.question: Is Kevin a subscription?
blocks.answer: On mitipi.eu you buy Kevin outright with a one-time payment. Lifetime software updates are included. There are no mandatory monthly monitoring fees.

blocks.question: What does free delivery cover?
blocks.answer: Free delivery across Europe on qualifying orders through mitipi.eu. Taxes are calculated at checkout based on your country.

blocks.question: What if Kevin stops working?
blocks.answer: Kevin includes a 3-year Swiss warranty. Contact support with your serial number (on the bottom of the device) and order reference for repair or replacement guidance.

blocks.question: Can I return Kevin?
blocks.answer: Yes—30-day returns apply as stated at checkout. Configure your color, try Kevin at home, and contact support if you need help with a return.

blocks.title: Transparent checkout
blocks.body: Configure your color on the secure Shopify checkout flow at mitipi.eu. Taxes calculated at checkout. Kevin is prevention-first protection you own outright—no surveillance subscriptions.

pricing.cta_subheading: Choose your front cover color and continue to secure checkout.

about-kevin.title: About Kevin
about-kevin.heading: Swiss innovation for prevention-first home security.
about-kevin.lede: Mitipi AG develops Kevin®, a presence simulation device that helps homes, flats, offices, and holiday properties look occupied when people are away—without cameras or microphones.
about-kevin.image_alt: Kevin® presence simulation — editorial product visual

blocks.heading: Everyone deserves to feel safe.
blocks.body: Burglars choose easy targets—dark windows, silent halls, predictable timers. Kevin adds believable light, shadow, and sound so your home reads as lived-in from the street.

blocks.title: Prevention, not surveillance
blocks.body: We believe deterrence should not require cameras or microphones. Kevin stores simulations locally on the device, uses typical power around 9 watts, and complements alarms and cameras rather than replacing them.

blocks.heading: From Zurich idea to global protection.
blocks.body: Kevin was conceived in Zurich. Mitipi was founded in 2018 and has since launched Kevin across Switzerland, Europe, and the United States.

blocks.title: Kevin idea born in Zurich
blocks.body: Development begins on a device that simulates human presence through light, shadow, and sound.

blocks.title: Launch in Switzerland
blocks.body: Kevin launches in Switzerland. Mitipi wins the Global Digital Insurance Agenda Award (DIA) in Amsterdam.

blocks.title: Kevin.2 and Bluefactory
blocks.body: Kevin.2 adds own recording and geo-fencing. Mitipi moves to Bluefactory in Fribourg and wins the Plus X Award in Germany.

blocks.title: Kevin.3 launch
blocks.body: Kevin.3 launches with upgraded hardware, personalizable features, and extended simulation. European and US patents granted.

blocks.title: European Security Award
blocks.body: Mitipi wins the European Security Award for the most innovative burglary protection in Europe.

blocks.title: Award-winning innovation
blocks.body: Kevin is an award-winning anti-intrusion device, engineered in Switzerland, with worldwide patents on technology to simulate the presence of people.

blocks.title: Mitipi AG
blocks.body: Mitipi AG · Passage du Cardinal 11 · Bluefactory · CH-1700 Fribourg · Switzerland · CHE-356.372.981. Kevin® is developed by Mitipi and sold in Europe through mitipi.eu.

about-kevin.cta_heading: Join the movement for safer homes.

press.title: Press
press.heading: Kevin® in the press.
press.lede: Media coverage and interviews about Mitipi, Kevin®, and prevention-first home security. For press kits and spokesperson requests, contact us below.

blocks.heading: What they are saying about Kevin®.
blocks.body: Selected quotes from international media and product reviews.

blocks.quote: The home security industry has a trust problem: most solutions rely on surveillance, forcing people to give up privacy in order to feel protected.
blocks.source: Safety Detectives — interview with Dr. Patrick Cotting, CEO, Mitipi AG

blocks.quote: This speaker with light and sound effects is supposed to scare off burglars, just like in the original Home Alone films. Kevin.3 is a step forward.
Mitipi Ltd. announces the global launch of KEVIN®.3, the newest version of its home invasion deterrent device—improved simulation based on artificial intelligence and lower energy consumption.
Basée à Fribourg, la société Mitipi collabore avec le Swiss AI Center pour doter Kevin de fonctionnalités IA capables de s'adapter aux habitudes des utilisateurs.
blocks.source: Le Temps — Mitipi & Swiss AI Center

blocks.quote: Who doesn't know the classic 90s movie 'Home Alone'? An absolutely fitting name for KEVIN®, the smart security companion by Mitipi.

blocks.heading: Award-winning innovation worldwide.
blocks.body: Kevin has been recognized for design, functionality, and burglary prevention innovation across Europe and the US.

careers.title: Careers
careers.heading: Build the future of prevention-first security.
careers.lede: Mitipi is a Swiss company rethinking home security around privacy, believable presence simulation, and AI—without cameras or microphones.

blocks.heading: Growth. Security. Innovation. Integrity.
blocks.body: We bring joy and security to customers worldwide. We think beyond the obvious—and we empower young talents and people with disabilities to grow with us.

blocks.title: Growth
blocks.body: We believe in a bright future for all of us. We strive to grow and develop a better future for everyone.

blocks.title: Security
blocks.body: We are bringing joy and security to the world and to our customers—prevention-first, privacy-respecting protection.

blocks.title: Innovation
blocks.body: We think beyond the obvious and come up with solutions nobody thought of before—from shadow simulation to AI household sounds.

blocks.heading: Small team. Global mission.
blocks.body: Under CEO Patrick Cotting, more than 30 people work on Kevin across Switzerland, California, Germany, and partner locations worldwide.

blocks.image_alt: Kevin® protecting a home while residents are away
blocks.title: What we work on
blocks.body: Hardware, mobile apps, AI sound generation, brand storytelling, and global expansion. If you care about physical security without surveillance, we would like to hear from you.

blocks.title: Open roles
blocks.body: There are no public job listings on kevinswiss.com at this time. Send your CV and a short note about what you would like to work on—we keep promising profiles on file for future openings.

careers.cta_subheading: Tell us what you build and why Kevin matters to you.

setup-guide.title: Setup guide
setup-guide.heading: Plug in. Schedule. Leave with peace of mind.
setup-guide.lede: Kevin setup takes about 60 seconds: connect power, place near a window, and configure in the Kevin app. No installation, no wiring, no monitoring panel.

blocks.heading: Four steps to believable presence.
blocks.body: Most customers complete setup in under a minute. Follow these steps for the best results.

blocks.title: Unbox and place
blocks.body: Set Kevin near a visible window with a wall or ceiling for shadows. Connect the included power cable (approx. 3 m). Typical use is around 9 watts.

blocks.title: Download the Kevin app
blocks.body: Pair your device over Wi-Fi or Bluetooth, rename it if you like, and confirm firmware is up to date.

blocks.title: Choose your routine
blocks.body: Activate instantly, schedule by day and hour, or enable geo-fencing so Kevin starts when you leave.

blocks.title: Test from outside
blocks.body: Step outside after dark and check what neighbours see—warm light, movement, and believable sound through the window.

blocks.heading: Where Kevin works best.
blocks.body: Kevin needs a visible window and a surface for shadows. Living rooms, ground-floor windows, and holiday-home facades are ideal.

blocks.image_alt: Kevin shadow simulation visible through a window at night
blocks.title: Window visibility matters
blocks.body: Burglars look for dark, silent homes. Position Kevin so light and shadow are visible through curtains from the street or hallway outside.

blocks.title: Try geo-fencing first
blocks.body: Geo-fencing is the easiest daily routine: Kevin activates when you leave and you never have to remember to tap the app.

blocks.heading: Setup FAQ
blocks.body: Answers to common first-day questions.

blocks.question: Does Kevin need Wi-Fi to simulate presence?
blocks.answer: Kevin stores simulations locally and plays them from the device. Wi-Fi or Bluetooth is used for app setup and updates—but core protection continues even when the network is unavailable.

blocks.question: Can I upload my own sounds?
blocks.answer: Yes. Record or upload familiar household sounds in the Kevin app. Kevin also uses AI-generated household audio to keep simulations believable and less repetitive.

blocks.question: What if something goes wrong?
blocks.answer: Kevin includes a 3-year Swiss warranty and 30-day returns. Note the serial number on the bottom of the unit and contact hello@lurafi.com with your order details.

blocks.title: Warranty & service
blocks.body: Kevin includes a 3-year Swiss warranty and 30-day returns. If your device stops working, note the serial number on the bottom of the unit and contact support with your order details.

setup-guide.cta_subheading: Our team can walk you through placement and app setup.

blocks.heading: How can we help?

blocks.question: How do I order Kevin?
blocks.answer: Configure your color at mitipi.eu/pages/configure and complete purchase through secure Shopify checkout. Free delivery across Europe on qualifying orders.

blocks.question: I need help with setup.
blocks.answer: See our setup guide at mitipi.eu/pages/setup-guide. For hands-on help, email hello@lurafi.com with your device serial number and a short description of the issue.

blocks.question: My Kevin stopped working.
blocks.answer: Kevin includes a 3-year Swiss warranty. Contact us with your serial number (on the bottom of the device) and order reference. We will guide you through repair or replacement.

blocks.question: Press or partnership inquiry?
blocks.answer: Email press@lurafi.com for media requests, product photos, and spokesperson availability. For B2B partnerships, include your company name and region in your message.

blocks.title: Orders & checkout
blocks.body: Configure your Kevin and complete purchase through secure Shopify checkout on mitipi.eu. Free delivery across Europe on qualifying orders. Taxes calculated at checkout.

blocks.title: Warranty repairs
blocks.body: If Kevin no longer works, contact us with your serial number (on the bottom of the device) and order reference. We will guide you through repair or replacement under the 3-year Swiss warranty.
